bridge-type.label: UniFi Controller
bridge-type.description: A UniFi console that provides a shared authenticated session

parameter.name: host
parameter.label: Host
parameter.description: Hostname or IP address of the UniFi console

parameter.name: username
parameter.label: Username
parameter.description: Local user account on the UniFi console

parameter.name: password
parameter.label: Password
parameter.description: Password for the local user account

parameter.name: port
parameter.label: Port
parameter.description: Port on which the UniFi console is listening (443 for UniFiOS, 8443 for legacy)

parameter.name: unifios
parameter.label: UniFi OS
parameter.description: Whether this is a UniFiOS console (selects /api/auth/login vs /api/login)
